zh.Nymet Tracey, Crediton, Devonshire, Engl: 英國英格蘭戴文尼特 白 諾斯 塔福頓
zh.Clerkenwell, London, Greater London, Eng: 英國英格蘭倫敦可拉肯維爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Joane Archbould於大約1548年出生在英國英格蘭倫敦時，她的父親Daniel Archbould29歲，母親Agnes Morfyn24歲。她於1569年8月7日與James Tozier在英國英格蘭倫敦易爾福德聖 可萊門也斯 邱奇結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1570年3月13日在英國倫敦享年23歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joane Archbould于大约1548年出生在英国英格兰倫敦时，她的父亲Daniel Archbould29岁，母亲Agnes Morfyn24岁。她于1569年8月7日与James Tozier在英国英格兰倫敦易爾福德聖 可萊門也斯 邱奇结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1570年3月13日在英国倫敦享年23岁。

nameMeanings.name: Archbould
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Archibald
meanings: Scottish and English: from a personal name, Archibald, of Anglo-Norman French and (ultimately) ancient Germanic origin (see Archambault ). In the Highlands of Scotland it was taken as an Anglicized equivalent of the Gaelic personal name Gille Easbaig ‘servant of the bishop’ (see Gillespie ), probably because of the approximate phonetic similarity between Arch(i)bald and easbaig. Both Archibald and Gillespie are personal names much favored among Clan Campbell.
History: This is the name of a leading Nova Scotia family, taken there by four brothers who emigrated from Londonderry, northern Ireland, in 1750–62.

nameMeanings.name: Joane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jean
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

en.lifeSummary: When Joane Archbould was born about 1548, in London, England, United Kingdom, her father, Daniel Archbould, was 29 and her mother, Agnes Morfyn, was 24. She married James Tozier on 7 August 1569, in St Clement's Church, Ilford, London, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 13 March 1570, in London, England, at the age of 23.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joane Archbould est née environ 1548, à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Daniel Archbould, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Agnes Morfyn, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé James Tozier le 7 août 1569, à St Clement's Church, Ilford, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 13 mars 1570, à Londres, Angleterre, à l’âge de 23 ans.

Lei sposato James Tozier il 7 agosto 1569, nel St Clement's Church, Ilford, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. ko.Saint Clements Dane, London, England: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 이퍼드 스트 클레멘트'스 c후르치

ko.lifeSummary: Joane Archbould(이)가 대략 1548년 영국 잉글랜드 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Daniel Archbould(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Morfyn(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1569년 8월 7일 영국 잉글랜드 런던 이퍼드 스트 클레멘트'스 c후르치에서 James Tozier(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1570년 3월 13일 영국 런던에서 23세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Nymet Tracey, Crediton, Devonshire, Engl: нимет би норт тавтон, девон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joane Archbould родилась около 1548 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Daniel Archbould было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Morfyn, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени James Tozier 7 августа 1569 г. в местности ст клемент'с чурч, илфорд, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 13 марта 1570 г. в местности Лондон, Англия в возрасте 23 лет.
